$notebookId..read: auth != null && (auth.token.role == 'admin' || auth.token.role == 'manager' || data.child('metadata/studentId').val() == auth.uid || data.child('metadata/teacherId').val() == auth.uid)

metadata..write: auth != null && (!data.exists() || auth.token.role == 'admin' || auth.token.role == 'manager' || data.parent().child('metadata/studentId').val() == auth.uid || data.parent().child('metadata/teacherId').val() == auth.uid)

$userId..write: auth != null && auth.uid == $userId && (auth.token.role == 'admin' || auth.token.role == 'manager' || root.child('notebooks').child($notebookId).child('metadata/studentId').val() == auth.uid || root.child('notebooks').child($notebookId).child('metadata/teacherId').val() == auth.uid)

$nodeId..write: auth != null && (!data.exists() || data.child('lastUpdatedBy').val() == auth.uid || newData.child('lastUpdatedBy').val() == auth.uid)
